title: westringia angustifolia
intro: Westringia angustifolia, also known as the Narrow Leaf Westringia, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health conditions such as colds, flu, and fever due to its antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Westringia angustifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Westringia angustifolia is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
